strName.description: The code name of the condrule, as referred to in other files.

strCond.description: Target stat condition this rule observes — refers to entry within conditions.json. CondRules emit a 'target' refKind for this field; the per-threshold Dc* effects under aThresholds use a distinct 'threshold-effect' refKind (see CLAUDE.md).

aThresholds.description: Threshold rows. Each is an object with strLootNew (a loot table that fires when the threshold is crossed), fMin/fMax (the threshold band), and fMinAdd/fMaxAdd (deltas applied on entry). The strLootNew refers to entry within loot.json. Per IVerifiable / CondRule.aThresholds → CondRuleThresh.strLootNew.
